title: Basic Greetings
description: Learn to say hello, goodbye, and basic courtesies
objective: Master common greeting phrases and responses

title: Introducing Yourself
description: Learn how to introduce yourself and ask for names
objective: Introduce yourself and ask others their names

title: Numbers 0-20
description: Learn to count and recognize basic numbers
objective: Confidently count from 0 to 20 in Spanish

title: Colors & Descriptions
description: Learn color names and basic color descriptions
objective: Name common colors and use them in simple sentences
